title: Add Updates to Activity Log
excerpt: My team often add comments and new info to tasks via the Updates tab on a task, but events here do not appear in the task’s activity log. It would be helpful to see updates in this view too.

posts.author: Michael_GL (Michael Charitou)
posts.cookedHtml: My team often add comments and new info to tasks via the Updates tab on a task, but events here do not appear in the task’s activity log. It would be helpful to see updates in this view too.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Michael_GL ,
The Board Email Reports got you back with this case.
It’s the unique app that provides reports on item updates. The types of reports:
On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

An example:

image1386×555 53 KB

The message in my inbox with xls-attachment where you can find updates details:
image395×499 21 KB

I hope you’ll find them helpful.
